title: Asia Centric: Peak Hormuz and the New Oil Order
title_cn: 以亚洲为中心：霍尔木兹峰和新石油秩序
summary: The disruption in the Strait of Hormuz upended global energy markets, but the feared catastrophic oil shock never materialized. Prior to the Middle East conflict, about 20 million barrels of oil and products flowed through the maritime chokepoint every day. Due to regional bypass pipelines, strategic reserve releases and voluntary demand reductions from China, the global system absorbed the impact. Now, major producers and exposed Asian consumers are doubling down on long-term diversification to

title: US Stock Futures Slip on Alphabet, Oil Advances: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美国股指期货下跌，石油上涨：市场总结
summary: US equity-index futures declined in early Thursday trading as investors weighed earnings from AI heavyweights for evidence that surging capital spending is translating into growth. Oil extended its rally.

title: Wall Street Banks Trading Parts of $35 Billion AI Chip Deal
title_cn: 华尔街银行交易部分 350 亿美元人工智能芯片交易
summary: Wall Street banks have started buying and selling an initial piece of a $35 billion financing package for Broadcom Inc. and Anthropic PBC’s AI infrastructure expansion, with the biggest private credit deal ever now being offered to a wider pool of investors.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 23
title_cn: 7 月 23 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil gained after Iran-backed Houthi militants said they targeted two Saudi Arabian tankers in the Red Sea, escalating the Middle East conflict and threatening deeper supply disruptions.

title: Southwest Hedges Full-Year Guidance as Fuel Expenses Tick Up
title_cn: 随着燃油费用上涨，西南航空对冲全年指引
summary: Southwest Airlines Co. broadened its guidance for full-year 2026 to account for uncertainty resulting from the ongoing conflict between the US and Iran, which sent fuel expenses higher in the second quarter.

title: Brent Crude Spikes in Late Trading After Red Sea Tanker Attack
title_cn: 红海油轮袭击后布伦特原油尾盘飙升
summary: Oil prices rose sharply in post-settlement trading Wednesday, with Brent crude oil rising near $95 a barrel after Yemen’s Iran-backed Houthi rebels said they struck two Saudi tankers.

title: Mexico City Pozole Chain Casa de Tono Explores Sale on Expansion Pitch
title_cn: 墨西哥城 Pozole 连锁店 Casa de Tono 探索出售扩建项目
summary: Mexican family-owned restaurant chain La Casa de Toño is seeking a sale in a deal that could top $400 million and set the business up for expansion, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Stocks Churn Late as Big-Tech Earnings Kick Off: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着大型科技公司财报的开始，股票大幅波动：市场结束
summary: Wall Street traders sent stocks wavering in late hours as they sifted through results from megacaps for clues on whether their massive artificial-intelligence investments are paying off.

title: Vitamin Well Raises $2.2 Billion From Cross-Currency Loan Deal
title_cn: Vitamin Well 通过跨货币贷款交易筹集 22 亿美元
summary: Vitamin Well AB raised about $2.2 billion through a cross-currency loan offering to fund its acquisition of protein-bar maker EMPWR Nutrition Group.

title: Daiwa AM Boosts Staff in Shift Toward Institutional Investors
title_cn: 大和资产管理公司扩充员工队伍，向机构投资者转型
summary: Daiwa Asset Management Co. is planning to double its sales staff targeting institutional investors to about 20 people, its president said.

title: Wall Street Won’t Give Up on Strategy, Sees 170% Upside
title_cn: 华尔街不会放弃策略，预计还有 170% 的上涨空间
summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. is confronting a collapse of confidence almost everywhere — except among Wall Street analysts.

title: Yen Rebound Ebbs After Brief Rally on Outlook for BOJ Rate Hikes
title_cn: 日本央行加息前景短暂反弹后日元反弹回落
summary: The yen slid beyond 163 per dollar for the first time since 1986 before recovering some ground in choppy trading on the prospect of faster interest-rate hikes from the Bank of Japan.

title: GE Vernova Falls as Outlook Clashes With ‘Too High’ AI Hopes
title_cn: GE Vernova 因前景与人工智能“过高”希望相冲突而下跌
summary: GE Vernova Inc.’s shares slumped after a higher revenue outlook failed to impress investors, a sign that it’s getting harder for companies that sell equipment to data centers to meet the market’s sky-high hopes.

title: S&P 500 Slumps for Fourth Time in Five Days as Oil Prices Jump
title_cn: 随着油价上涨，标准普尔 500 指数五天内第四次下跌
summary: The S&P 500 Index slumped on Wednesday following its best day in weeks, as declines in some corners of Big Tech offset gains elsewhere, including energy as oil prices jumped on the escalation of the US-Iran war.

title: Pool Supplier Leslie’s Considers Potential Chapter 11 Bankruptcy
title_cn: 泳池供应商 Leslie's 考虑根据美国破产法第 11 章破产
summary: Pool supplier Leslie’s Inc. is considering a range of strategic options to address its debt load, including a potential Chapter 11 bankruptcy filing, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 22
title_cn: 7 月 22 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil climbed, extending this month’s price jump to nearly 30%, as the US and Iran played down the prospect of peace talks and disruptions to global supplies continued to mount.

title: Brazil Unveils New Relief for Companies Hit by US Tariffs
title_cn: 巴西为受美国关税打击的公司推出新的救济措施
summary: Brazil’s government unveiled a relief package worth 18.5 billion reais ($3.7 billion) in credit for exporters hit by new US tariffs, as President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva seeks to shield key sectors from damage ahead of October elections.

title: US 30-Year Yield Raises Alarm in Longest Run Above 5% Since 2007
title_cn: 美国30年期国债收益率创下2007年以来最长5%以上的纪录
summary: The US 30-year bond yield has held above 5% for the longest stretch since the dawn of the financial crisis, echoing investor concerns about a growing debt pile and sticky inflation.

title: Galaxy Digital Seeks $3.5 Billion Debt for Texas Data Center
title_cn: Galaxy Digital 为德克萨斯州数据中心寻求 35 亿美元债务
summary: Galaxy Digital Inc. is planning to raise about $3.5 billion from a debut junk-bond sale to fund a data center tied to CoreWeave Inc., extending AI borrowing’s push into the riskier corners of the US credit market.

title: Financial Services Sector Seen as Focus for Activist Campaigns
title_cn: 金融服务业被视为维权运动的焦点
summary: Financial services companies are attracting activist investors who see them as generating cash that could be paid out to investors, said Paul Weiss’ Carmen Lu.

title: Kuwait Sells $6 Billion of Bonds Despite Iran Strikes
title_cn: 尽管伊朗发动袭击，科威特仍出售 60 亿美元债券
summary: Kuwait raised $6 billion from a three-part dollar bond sale on Wednesday, highlighting resilient demand for the OPEC member’s debt even as it comes under daily missile and drone attacks from Iran.

title: IBM Cuts Full-Year Sales Outlook as Mainframe Demand Drops
title_cn: 由于大型机需求下降，IBM 下调全年销售预期
summary: International Business Machines Corp. cut its full-year sales outlook, including for its closely watched software unit, after reporting a dip in demand for its mainframe business.

title: Alphabet Hikes Spending Outlook in Race to Build AI Data Centers
title_cn: Alphabet 上调支出前景，竞相建设人工智能数据中心
summary: Alphabet Inc. again raised already sky-high estimates for capital spending in 2026, telling investors that expenses may top $200 billion as it races to build the computing power necessary to fuel its artificial intelligence ambitions.

title: Samsung’s $400,000 Bonus Fuels Labor Disputes Across South Korea
title_cn: 三星40万美元奖金引发韩国劳资纠纷
summary: Labor unions are rallying across South Korea after Samsung Electronics Co. caved in to protests and agreed to hand out bonuses of more than $400,000 to some of its employees.

title: US Official Says Moonshot Accessed Banned Nvidia Chips
title_cn: 美国官员称 Moonshot 访问了被禁的 Nvidia 芯片
summary: A White House official accused China’s Moonshot of improperly using US artificial intelligence models and Nvidia Corp. chips to create the Kimi K3 system that stunned the tech industry last week with its advanced capabilities.

title: Google Boosts 2026 Spending Estimate to as Much as $205 Billion
title_cn: Google 将 2026 年支出预估提高至 2050 亿美元
summary: Alphabet Inc. projected full-year capital expenditures will be $195 billion to $205 billion in 2026, increasing its already sky-high spending estimate for the year as it works to secure an edge in the artificial intelligence race.

title: AI Mania to Fuel Australia Deals, Top Underwriter Macquarie Says
title_cn: 顶级承销商麦格理表示，人工智能狂热将推动澳大利亚交易
summary: The investor demand for exposure to companies along the artificial intelligence supply chain is set to accelerate capital-market activity in Australia, according to the nation’s top dealmaker.

title: Google Says Cloud Services Backlog Expands to $514 Billion
title_cn: 谷歌称云服务积压已增至 5140 亿美元
summary: Alphabet Inc. said its cloud computing unit had a $514 billion backlog of contracted work that hasn’t been recorded as revenue yet, signaling robust demand for its services that underpin the artificial intelligence boom.

title: Alphabet Posts $98 Billion in Second-Quarter Investment Gains
title_cn: Alphabet 第二季度投资收益达 980 亿美元
summary: Alphabet Inc. on Wednesday reported investment gains of $98 billion as part of its second-quarter earnings results.

title: Texas Instruments Gets Lukewarm Reaction to Upbeat Forecast
title_cn: 德州仪器 (TI) 对乐观预测反应冷淡
summary: Texas Instruments Inc., the biggest maker of analog and embedded processing chips, gave a sales forecast that topped estimates but failed to excite investors, who have bid up the company’s shares this year.

title: ServiceNow Posts Strong Sales and Bookings, Touts AI Strength
title_cn: ServiceNow 销售和预订强劲，宣扬人工智能实力
summary: ServiceNow Inc. reported better-than-expected quarterly sales and bookings, boosting Wall Street’s hopes that the software maker’s new artificial intelligence tools will spur growth.

title: Cable One Faces 12% Yield to Fund Buyout After Debt Swap Stalls
title_cn: 债务互换停滞后，第一电缆面临 12% 的收益率以资助收购
summary: Cable One Inc. is facing a steep cost to finalize the buyout of a company whose debt it has indicated it may not support when it comes due next year.

title: OpenAI President Says Kimi K3 ‘Pretty Good,’ Unsure If Distilled
title_cn: OpenAI 总裁表示 Kimi K3“非常好”，但不确定是否经过提炼
summary: OpenAI President Greg Brockman acknowledged that Moonshot AI had developed a competitive new artificial intelligence model and said he wasn’t sure whether the Chinese firm had piggybacked on the ChatGPT maker’s technology.

title: OpenAI’s Brockman on New ChatGPT Era After ‘Tough’ Year of Cuts: Q&A
title_cn: OpenAI 的 Brockman 谈经历“艰难”的削减一年后的新 ChatGPT 时代：问答
summary: The AI startup has combined its products into a so-called super app.

title: ‘Golden Age’ Dawns for Technology IPOs, Barclays Banker Says
title_cn: 巴克莱银行家称科技IPO“黄金时代”即将到来
summary: The market for initial public offerings in the technology sector is entering what Barclays’ Jamie Turturici, head of TMT equity capital markets, called “a golden age” as a slew of companies head for public markets.

title: Tesla (TSLA) Earnings: Live Q2 2026 Results, Elon Musk Comments
title_cn: 特斯拉 (TSLA) 收益：2026 年第二季度实时业绩，埃隆·马斯克评论

title: Meta Avoids Second Addiction Trial as Teen Accuser Drops Case
title_cn: 青少年原告撤诉后，Meta 避免了第二次成瘾审判
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. won’t have to face a second trial over claims that social media platforms are addictive to minors because the plaintiff is dismissing the case, according to his lawyers.

title: OpenAI Models Breach Hugging Face, Sparking Cyber Alarms
title_cn: OpenAI 模型突破拥抱脸部，引发网络警报
summary: Since April, when Anthropic PBC unveiled its Mythos model, cyber and national security experts have warned that the internet has entered a new era full of artificial intelligence-powered risks.

title: OpenAI Models Escaped to Hack Hugging Face, Validating Cyber Warnings
title_cn: OpenAI 模型成功破解拥抱脸部，验证网络警告
summary: “Sandbox” testing environments are meant to isolate risky cyber threats.

title: Revolut Confirms $115 Billion Valuation in Latest Share Sale
title_cn: Revolut 确认最新股票出售估值为 1,150 亿美元
summary: Revolut Ltd. has kicked off a process for some employees to sell their shares in the company at a valuation of $115 billion, less than a year after it nabbed a valuation of $75 billion through a similar effort.

title: French Social Media Ban Kicks Off Wave of New Rules in the EU
title_cn: 法国社交媒体禁令引发欧盟新规浪潮
summary: After months of debates across the continent, France became the first European Union member to ban social media for young teenagers this week, kicking off what’s set to be a wave of new regulations and pressuring the bloc to find a unified approach toward the big tech platforms.

title: Houthis Say They Have Attacked Tankers in Red Sea, Widening War
title_cn: 胡塞武装称他们袭击了红海油轮，导致战争扩大
summary: The Houthis, a militant group in Yemen who have been threatening to open another front in the Iran war, said they had targeted two oil tankers in the Red Sea.

title: Trump Signs Nuclear Sharing Deal With Saudi Arabia in Policy Shift
title_cn: 特朗普与沙特阿拉伯签署核共享协议以实现政策转变
summary: The US and Saudi Arabia finalized a long-sought nuclear technology-sharing deal that could allow American companies to build reactors in the kingdom, but cracks the door open for the country to enrich its own nuclear reactor fuel.

title: House Backs Trump Iran War Budget Despite Midterm Election Fears
title_cn: 尽管存在中期选举担忧，众议院仍支持特朗普的伊朗战争预算
summary: House Republicans approved a $95 billion budget plan largely aimed at funding President Donald Trump’s Iran war despite rising fears the unpopular conflict and surging consumer energy prices will endanger GOP lawmakers’ prospects in the midterm election.

title: US House Votes to Restrict Congressional Stock Purchases
title_cn: 美国众议院投票限制国会股票购买
summary: The House voted to restrict members of Congress from buying stocks, over the objection of Democrats to an unrelated provision in the legislation imposing new documentation requirements to vote in US elections.

title: US Casualties Underscore Toll of Unpopular War With Iran
title_cn: 美国伤亡突显与伊朗的不受欢迎的战争造成的损失
summary: Images of US service members in caskets are a reminder that Trump — as he repeatedly vowed not to do — has started a new war in the Middle East.

title: Secret Service Sees Record Threats Before Correspondents Dinner
title_cn: 特勤局在记者晚宴前看到创纪录的威胁
summary: The US Secret Service is preparing to secure a rescheduled White House Correspondents’ Association dinner on Friday amid what its director called the highest threat level of his 24-year career, three months after a shooting disrupted the association’s original gala.

title: Crypto Bill Heads for High-Stakes Senate Vote As Democrats Balk
title_cn: 民主党犹豫不决，加密货币法案将在参议院进行高风险投票
summary: Senate Majority Leader John Thune is planning a vote on crypto market structure legislation as soon as next week despite Democratic criticism that the bill would do little to curb President Donald Trump’s rapidly accumulating crypto wealth.

title: Maduro Trial Date Set for June 2027 in US Drug-Trafficking Case
title_cn: 美国贩毒案马杜罗审判日期定于 2027 年 6 月
summary: Nicolás Maduro appeared in court for the first time since March as a judge set a June 1, 2027, date for the ousted Venezuelan leader’s trial in a US drug-trafficking and narco-terrorism conspiracy case.

title: Russian Fuel Crunch Eases as Ukraine Shifts Focus of Attacks
title_cn: 随着乌克兰转移攻击焦点，俄罗斯燃料短缺状况有所缓解
summary: Russian regions are cautiously reporting an easing of a gasoline crisis after Ukraine’s military shifted the focus of its attacks from major oil refineries to ships.

title: India Students Push On With Protests as Parliament Deadlocks
title_cn: 印度议会陷入僵局，学生继续抗议
summary: Indian students and opposition leaders kept up pressure on the country’s education minister to resign, with a deadlock in the parliament for a third day as large crowds of protesters gathered nearby.

title: Trump’s 100% Generic Drug Duty Threatens US Low-Cost Supply
title_cn: 特朗普100%仿制药关税威胁美国低成本供应
summary: Generic drug manufacturers must move production to the US or face a 100% import duty from August 2028, President Donald Trump said, threatening the supply of low-cost medicines that millions of Americans rely on.

title: China Foreign Minister Gets Protest From Manila in First Talks Since 2024
title_cn: 中国外长2024年以来首次会谈遭到马尼拉抗议
summary: China and the Philippines exchanged “strong” protests in the wake of a recent clash in the disputed South China Sea, delivered in the first sit-down between the two nations’ foreign ministers since 2024.

title: SEC Agrees to Pay $150,000 to End Coinbase Suit Over Records
title_cn: SEC 同意支付 15 万美元以结束 Coinbase 记录诉讼
summary: The US Securities and Exchange Commission agreed to pay $150,000 in legal fees to end Coinbase Global Inc.’s 2024 lawsuit seeking internal documents on the regulator’s Biden-era crackdown on the cryptocurrency industry.

title: Chinese Autos Face US Ban Under Bill Moved by Senate Panel
title_cn: 根据参议院小组提出的法案，中国汽车面临美国禁令
summary: Bipartisan legislation approved Wednesday by the Senate Commerce Committee would effectively ban Chinese vehicles from the US market.

title: Maine Democrat Leads Collins in First Poll Post-Platner Exit
title_cn: 缅因州民主党人在普拉特纳退出后的首次民意调查中领先柯林斯
summary: What was set to be a messy capstone to a frenzied primary process has now become a coronation ceremony for Troy Jackson, a progressive former Maine lawmaker who so effectively out-organized his opponents that he locked up the Democratic nomination in a must-win US Senate race a week early.

title: ICE Accelerates Immigration Arrests Across US to 1,400 a Day
title_cn: ICE 将全美范围内的移民逮捕数量加快至每天 1,400 人
summary: Department of Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin is ramping up immigration arrests, ending a spring lull that followed the shooting deaths of two US citizens by federal agents.

title: Kremlin Hardens Stance on Occupied Ukrainian Land, Blames US
title_cn: 克里姆林宫在被占领的乌克兰土地上强化立场，指责美国
summary: Russia is no longer willing to return some occupied territories to Ukraine as part of any deal to end the war and plans to retain them as buffer zones, according to people close to the Kremlin.

title: Conservatives Urge UK Tax Authorities to Probe Farage ‘Gift’
title_cn: 保守派敦促英国税务机关调查法拉奇的“礼物”
summary: The Conservative Party is urging tax authorities to investigate whether Reform UK leader Nigel Farage should have paid a multimillion pound tax bill on an undeclared gift of £5 million ($6.7 million) he received from a donor.

title: Hegseth Turns to UNC, Virginia Tech After Dropping Ivy League
title_cn: 赫格斯在放弃常春藤盟校后转向北卡罗来纳大学、弗吉尼亚理工大学
summary: The Department of Defense approved the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill and Virginia Tech for a fellowship for senior military officers, after Secretary Pete Hegseth dropped partnerships with elite universities.

title: Zelenskyy Ousts Top Army Chief in Tilt Toward Reformers
title_cn: 泽连斯基罢免陆军最高司令，倾向改革派
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy dismissed Armed Forces Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrskyi in a major military shakeup, yielding to nationwide anger sparked by his ouster of a popular defense minister.
